strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including building high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) generators and agentic workflows.
Entrepreneurial track record with experience across a wide variety of tech stacks and some relevant exposure to the fintech sector.
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience, having worked almost exclusively as an Individual Contributor (Senior/Staff Engineer) rather than a CTO or VP.
No evidence of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people or managing external delivery partners and senior technical leadership layers.
Agentic AI experience is recent and tool-focused, lacking the required depth in architecting stateful, real-time AI trading or credit risk systems.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with deep hands-on expertise in backend development, distributed systems, and modern AI tooling. However, he is fundamentally mismatched for an executive CTO role, as his resume lacks any experience in senior organizational leadership, scaling engineering teams, managing hybrid delivery models, or architecting complex, production-grade agentic AI systems for financial decisioning.
